title: 2026-01-26 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 10.93
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-01-26: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 10.93/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2026-01-26, the score printed 10.93/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
